name: MSD_HTTP_Connector_Flow
description: MSD flow looks up user information using ANI, and then looks up the Case Details by the Customer ID.

variables.name: CustomerID
variables.description: Use CustomerID to get Case Details for a particular contact

properties.description: Strips "+" of the country code from the Caller ANI
properties.name: StripANI

properties.description: Plays case details to the customer.

promptsTts.value:
Hello, {{ContactName}} !
I see, a ticket was created for you recently regarding {{CaseTitle}}. The case number of which is {{CaseNumber}}.
Our team is still working on your ticket. Please wait for 48 hours for us to provide you the resolution.

properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech
properties.name: PlayCaseTitle

promptsTts.value:
Press 1 to connect to an agent.
Press 2 to disconnect this call.

properties.description: HTTP request to lookup Case Info by Customer ID (retrieved from the previous request)
properties.contentType:name: JSON
properties.connectorId:name: Msft-Dynamics
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.name: GetCaseInfo
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: GET

properties.name: ConditionCheck
properties.description: Condition to check the value of CaseTitle.
Plays no case found information to the customer.

promptsTts.value:
Hello!
It looks like there is no Case associated with the number you are calling from.
 Let me transfer your call to one of our agents to assist you today.

properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech
properties.name: PlayNoCaseMessage
